name: Satellite Ground Station Compromise
description: Attack tree modelling compromise of satellite ground station infrastructure targeting telemetry, tracking, command (TT&C) uplinks, and mission control systems
root_objective: Compromise satellite operations via ground station infrastructure

nodes.title: Compromise Satellite Ground Station
nodes.description: Take control of satellite ground station to intercept communications, inject commands, or disrupt satellite operations

nodes.title: Infiltrate Ground Station Network
nodes.description: Gain access to the ground station's mission control network

nodes.title: Compromise Internet-Facing Systems
nodes.description: Exploit web servers, VPN gateways, or email systems at the ground station facility

nodes.title: Supply Chain via Ground Equipment Vendor
nodes.description: Compromise a vendor providing antenna controllers, modems, or tracking equipment

nodes.title: Inject Malicious Uplink Commands
nodes.description: Send unauthorised commands to the satellite via the TT&C uplink

nodes.title: Hijack Command and Control Uplink
nodes.description: Take over the C2 uplink transmitter to send attitude control, orbit adjustment, or payload commands

nodes.title: Replay Captured Uplink Commands
nodes.description: Record and replay legitimate command sequences if authentication is weak or absent

nodes.title: Intercept Satellite Downlink
nodes.description: Eavesdrop on satellite telemetry or payload data being received at the ground station

nodes.title: Deploy Rogue Receive Antenna
nodes.description: Set up an independent antenna to intercept unencrypted satellite downlink signals within the footprint

nodes.title: Compromise Telemetry Processing System
nodes.description: Access the telemetry decoder/processor to read or modify satellite health and mission data

nodes.title: Disrupt Satellite Operations
nodes.description: Cause denial of service to satellite mission operations

nodes.title: Jam Uplink Frequency
nodes.description: Transmit high-power interference on the satellite's uplink frequency to prevent legitimate commands

nodes.title: Deorbit or Reposition Satellite
nodes.description: If C2 access obtained, command the satellite to change orbit, exhaust fuel, or point sensors away
